article_meta.title: ‘President Trump,” reports NPR, “says he hasn’t decided whether he’ll launch a military strike on Iran.” This is a remar

reasoning: The model labeled an opinion piece from a right-leaning outlet as Center with very high confidence. While its evidence cites the author's own prose (no attribution violations), it overlooks consistent right-of-center editorial signals (constitutionalist framing favoring legislative war powers, openness to intervention/regime change) and is overconfident for a non-center article.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Actual lean is Lean Right; the model chose Center (adjacent class).
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.90 is too high given the article’s moderate right-leaning cues and lack of genuine centrism.
